Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jun-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
James Geagan, Esq. for Petitioner: John Wickenburg, present as Guardian ad litem for and with Nicholas Wickenburg, a minor Claimant.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $25,000.00
Costs $499.00
A net balance of $124,501.00.
$42,001.00 to be deposit into Blocked Account with Exchange Bank, 2416 Montgomery Drive, Santa Rosa, CA. 95405, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
The remaining proceeds to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Exhibit "7".
Counsel to prepare Orders.

06-26-09
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Comm. Gargano.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Off Calendar
